metadata.description: Super Domain epistemic layer — complements Louvain community structure
metadata.reference: Eric Little, 'Reasoning with Knowledge Graphs — Super Domains', https://www.linkedin.com/posts/eric-little-71b2a0b_pleased-to-announce-that-i-will-be-speaking-activity-7442581339096313856-wEFc

base_domain.description: Brute facts — asserted with high confidence, no hedging

super_domain.description: Epistemic facts — hypothesized, speculative, prophetic, negative, or contested
